chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1045 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 09.10.2024 Petitioner namely Ali Gohar Soomro present in person Mr. Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for respondent- University Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>>...<<<<<<< Learned counsel for respondent-University has produced one original cheque through his statement. The original cheque is handed over to the petitioner, who is present in Court under proper acknowledgment. In case the cheque is bounced, the respondent-University shall be exposed to contempt of Court proceedings. Accordingly, the petition has served its purpose and is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
